message.content:
@startuml
title Traffic influencing flows between OpenNESS controller and 5G Core

skinparam shadowing false
skinparam roundcorner 12
skinparam sequence {
  ParticipantPadding 35
  BoxPadding 20
  LifeLineBorderColor #888888
  LifeLineBackgroundColor transparent
  ActorBorderColor #666666
  ActorFontColor #000000
  ParticipantBorderColor #666666
  ParticipantFontColor #000000
  GroupBorderColor #000000
  GroupBackgroundColor #FFFFFF
  NoteBorderColor #999999
  NoteBackgroundColor #FFF9C4
}

actor "User/Admin" as UA

box "OpenNESS Controller components" #BFE3F2
  participant "UI/CLI" as UICLI
  participant "AF Microservice" as AF
end box

box "5G Core components" #8EF08E
  participant "NEF" as NEF
  participant "NGC\nCP Functions" as NGC
end box

note over NEF
OpenNESS provided
Core component with
limited functionality
end note

group "Get all subscribed traffic influence info"
UA -> UICLI : Request all traffic influence\nsubscribed
activate UICLI
UICLI -> AF : /af/v1/subscriptions : GET
activate AF
AF -> NEF : /3gpp-traffic-Influence/v1/{afId}/subscriptions\n: GET
activate NEF
NEF -> NEF : NGC_STUB(PCF,UDR,BSF)
NEF -> NGC : {Open: 3rd party NGC\nintegration with\nOpenNESS(NEF)}
NGC --> NEF
NEF --> AF : OK: traffic influence info\nERROR: {400/500}
deactivate NEF
AF --> UICLI : OK: traffic influence info\nERROR: {400/500}
deactivate AF
UICLI --> UA : Traffic influence details
deactivate UICLI
end group

group "Get subscribed traffic influence info by subscriptionId"
UA -> UICLI : Request traffic influence using\nsubscriptionId
activate UICLI
UICLI -> AF : /af/v1/subscriptions/{subscriptionId}\n: GET
activate AF
AF -> NEF : /3gpp-traffic-Influence/v1/{afId}/subscriptions/{subscriptionId}\n: GET
activate NEF
NEF -> NEF : NGC_STUB(PCF,UDR,BSF)
NEF -> NGC : {Open: 3rd party NGC\nintegration with\nOpenNESS(NEF)}
NGC --> NEF
NEF --> AF : OK: traffic influence info\nERROR: {400/500}
deactivate NEF
AF --> UICLI : OK: traffic influence info\nERROR: {400/500}
deactivate AF
UICLI --> UA : Traffic influence details
deactivate UICLI
end group

@enduml
